comment: FFM downcall stub for libjam's jam_mm, used by NativeJAM when -Djam.native.binding=ffm. Mirrors NativeJAM's FunctionDescriptor: int jam_mm(jlong ctx, jlong w,jint wt,jint ldw, jlong a,jint at,jint lda, jlong r,jint rt,jint ldr, jint m,jint n,jint k). GraalVM Native Image needs downcalls registered (no auto-detection); -H:+ForeignAPISupport is default-on in 25.
